turns.text: The diagram shows blood entering and leaving the brain and the small intestine through blood vessels W, X, Y and Z. Which blood vessels carry blood rich in oxygen and digested food? Fill in the boxes with W, X, Y and/or Z.

turns.text: In humans, the greater the size of the lungs, the greater the amount of air that can enter the lungs. A man had a bacterial infection which caused one of his lungs to be filled with fluid (liquid). As a result, his breathing rate changed. Q1.assignment: The diagram shows blood entering and leaving the brain and the small intestine through blood vessels W, X, Y and Z. Which blood vessels carry blood rich in oxygen and digested food? Fill in the boxes with W, X, Y and/or Z.
Q1.tutoring_feedback: Great job on your answer! You correctly identified that blood vessels W and Y carry blood rich in oxygen and digested food. Your understanding of the concepts and use of appropriate science vocabulary were strong. To improve further, make sure to carefully observe the diagram to accurately identify which blood vessels carry specific substances. Keep up the good work!

Q2.assignment: In humans, the greater the size of the lungs, the greater the amount of air that can enter the lungs. A man had a bacterial infection which caused one of his lungs to be filled with fluid (liquid). As a result, his breathing rate changed. (i) State how his breathing rate changed due to the infection.
Q2.tutoring_feedback: Great job on understanding how the bacterial infection affected the man's breathing rate - you correctly stated that it slowed down. You also did well in identifying key concepts in the question. To improve, try using more specific science vocabulary to enhance your answer. Keep up the good work!
